text: Dear Sir, Thank you for your inquiry. For Acetylsalicylic acid (CAS 50-78-2), USP grade, our best price is USD 12.50/kg CIP Moscow. MOQ 25 kg. We can provide CoA and TDS. Payment T/T in advance. Lead time 15 days. Best regards.
Hi, our quotation: 8.00 EUR per kg, FCA Shanghai. Minimum order quantity 1 ton. Purity 99.5% min. Certificate of analysis available. 30% deposit, balance before shipment. Delivery within 3 weeks.
Price RMB 90/kg EXW our factory. We have technical data sheet for this product. MOQ: 100 kg. Industrial grade. Payment L/C at sight.
Hello, we can offer $15/kg CIF Hamburg, lead time 20 days. CoA and spec sheet provided upon request. MOQ 50 kg.
Thanks for reaching out. This item requires custom synthesis, lead time 6-8 weeks. We will revert with price after feasibility check. Pharmaceutical grade possible.
Sorry, this product is currently out of stock. We expect restock next month. Usual price around USD 20/kg FOB Ningbo, MOQ 200 kg, CoA included.
